name: Lady Apple Fruit Wreath
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese, 1-2 tablespoons of milk, and 2-3 drops of red food coloring in a small bowl until smooth and creamy.
2. Frost each apple with a scant teaspoonful of the cheese mixture, covering the bottom half of the apple.
3. Dip the bottoms of the apples in chopped pecans.
4. Arrange the apples around the base of the parsley or watercress to form a wreath.
